de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency

Class AbstractFileRepo

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency.AbstractFileRepo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofDisposedListener, FileRepo
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    DiskFileRepo, MemoryFileRepo, SimpleFileRepo

    public abstract class AbstractFileRepo
extends java.lang.Object
implements FileRepo
    Abstract repo implementation to perform tasks independent from the concrete way the files are cached. This mainly includes saving of all files registered to the repo as well as adapting the references (e.g. "javaPath") in *.key files.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected static java.nio.file.PathMatcher CLASS_MATCHER
      This matcher matches *.class files.
      protected static java.nio.file.PathMatcher JAVA_MATCHER
      This matcher matches *.java files.
      protected static java.nio.file.PathMatcher KEY_MATCHER
      A matcher matches *.key and *.proof files.
      protected static java.net.URL REDUX_URL
      The URL to KeY's built-in Java classes (used to prevent these classes from getting copied).
      protected static java.net.URL RULES_URL
      The URL to KeY's built-in rules (used to prevent built-in rules from getting copied).
      protected static java.nio.file.PathMatcher ZIP_MATCHER
      This matcher matches *.zip and *.jar files.

    • Method Detail

      • createDirsAndCopy

        protected static void createDirsAndCopy(java.nio.file.Path source,
                                        java.nio.file.Path target)
                                 throws java.io.IOException
        Copyies the file at source path to the target path and creates parent directories if required.
        Parameters:
        source - path of the source file
        target - path of the target file
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs (e.g. user has no permission to write target)

      • isInternalFile

        protected static boolean isInternalFile(java.nio.file.Path path)
                                 throws java.net.MalformedURLException
        Tests if the given path references an internal file in KeY, i.e. if it is inside JavaRedux or rules folder.
        Parameters:
        path - the path to test
        Returns:
        true iff it is an internal file
        Throws:
        java.net.MalformedURLException - if the path can not be converted to an URL

      • isInternalResource

        protected static boolean isInternalResource(java.net.URL url)
        Tests if the given URL references an internal resource of KeY, i.e. if it is a Java or rule file shipped with KeY (may be inside a jar file).
        Parameters:
        url - the url to test
        Returns:
        true iff the file is an internal file

        protected java.nio.file.Path getJavaPath()

        protected void addFile(java.nio.file.Path p)
        Adds the given file to the list of files to save.
        Parameters:

      • getRegisteredProofs

        protected java.util.Set<Proof> getRegisteredProofs()

      • isInJavaPath

        protected boolean isInJavaPath(java.nio.file.Path path)
        Checks if the given path is inside the Java path
        Parameters:
        path - the path to check
        Returns:
        true if the path is inside the Java path and false if not

      • isInBootClassPath

        protected boolean isInBootClassPath(java.nio.file.Path path)
        Checks if the given path is inside the boot class path
        Parameters:
        path - the path to check
        Returns:
        true if the path is inside the boot class path and false if not

      • saveProof

        public void saveProof(java.nio.file.Path savePath)
               throws java.io.IOException
        Stores all files stored in the FileRepo in a consistent package as a ZIP archive at the given target path. If a file with the given path exists, it is deleted first.
        Parameters:
        savePath - the target path of the ZIP archive
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - on IO errors, e.g. if the user has no permission to write at the path

      • getSaveName

        protected abstract java.nio.file.Path getSaveName(java.nio.file.Path path)
        Return the save name for a given file.
        Parameters:
        path - the given file (absolute or relative to the proof base directory)
        Returns:
        the name (may include subdirectories) the file should have in proof package, that is a path relative to the root of the package

      • getInputStream

        public java.io.InputStream getInputStream(java.nio.file.Path path)
                                   throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: FileRepo
        Provides access to a file on disk. May return null if the path cannot be handled by this repository.
        Specified by:
        getInputStream in interface FileRepo
        Parameters:
        path - the path of the file
        Returns:
        an InputStream of the requested file, or null
        Throws:
        java.io.FileNotFoundException - if the file does not exist
        java.io.IOException - on IO errors, e.g. if the user has no permission to read the file

      • getInputStream

        public java.io.InputStream getInputStream(RuleSource ruleSource)
                                   throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: FileRepo
        Provides access to the InputStream of a RuleSource. The file the RuleSource is read from is registered to the FileRepo. May return null if the source cannot be handled by this repository.
        Specified by:
        getInputStream in interface FileRepo
        Parameters:
        ruleSource - the RuleSource
        Returns:
        an InputStream of the RuleSource, or null
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - on IO errors

      • getInputStreamInternal

        protected abstract java.io.InputStream getInputStreamInternal(java.nio.file.Path p)
                                                       throws java.io.FileNotFoundException
        Can be used to get a direct InputStream to a file stored in the FileRepo. The concrete implementation depends on the concrete FileRepo.
        Parameters:
        p - the original path (outside the FileRepo) of the requested file
        Returns:
        an InputStream of the resource or null if it has not been stored in the FileRepo before.
        Throws:
        java.io.FileNotFoundException - if the does not file exist, is a directory, or can not be opened

      • adaptFileRefs

        protected java.io.InputStream adaptFileRefs(java.nio.file.Path p)
                                     throws java.io.IOException
        Rewrites the file references inside of .key/.proof files such that the point correctly to the copied files in the ZIP file.
        Parameters:
        p - the path of the file where the references are adapted
        Returns:
        an InputStream to a (in-memory) copy of the file
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs

      • setBootClassPath

        public void setBootClassPath(java.io.File path)
                      throws java.lang.IllegalStateException
        Description copied from interface: FileRepo
        Sets the bootclasspath (containing available classes from the Java Class Library).
        Specified by:
        setBootClassPath in interface FileRepo
        Parameters:
        path - the bootclasspath to set (the method does nothing if null is given)
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the java path is already set

      • setClassPath

        public void setClassPath(java.util.List<java.io.File> paths)
                  throws java.lang.IllegalStateException
        Description copied from interface: FileRepo
        Sets the classpath.
        Specified by:
        setClassPath in interface FileRepo
        Parameters:
        paths - the classpath to set (the method does nothing if null is given)
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the java path is already set

      • setJavaPath

        public void setJavaPath(java.lang.String path)
                 throws java.lang.IllegalStateException
        Description copied from interface: FileRepo
        Sets the java path (where the source files are located).
        Specified by:
        setJavaPath in interface FileRepo
        Parameters:
        path - the java path to set (the method does nothing if null is given)
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the java path is already set

      • setBaseDir

        public void setBaseDir(java.nio.file.Path path)
        Description copied from interface: FileRepo
        Sets the base directory of the proof, i.e. the main directory where the proof is loaded from. When loading Java sources this is the directory the loaded file resides in. When loading .key-Files this is the directory specified via "\\javaSource" or the directory of the .key-File, if no source directory is specified. This is needed by the FileRepo for resolving pathnames.
        Specified by:
        setBaseDir in interface FileRepo
        Parameters:
        path - The path of the base directory. If a file is given, then its parent directory is set as base path.

      • registerProof

        public void registerProof(Proof proof)
        Description copied from interface: FileRepo
        Register the proof in the FileRepo.
        Specified by:
        registerProof in interface FileRepo
        Parameters:
        proof - the proof to register

        protected void dispose()
        Clears all data in the FileRepo and marks it as disposed.
